subject.description: Mid-30s white male, slight stubble, wearing a wrinkled light blue button-down shirt untucked, dark jeans, slightly disheveled hair. Expression: wide eyes, jaw slightly dropped, eyebrows raised — pure bewildered disbelief. Skin texture shows real pores, light stubble hairs individually visible.
subject.action: Standing completely still, arms slightly out from his sides in a 'what the hell?' posture, staring directly into the camera lens.

setting.location: Open office floor surrounded on all sides by towering chrome T-1000 style humanoid robots — liquid metal finish, featureless faces, standing shoulder-to-shoulder in a tight circle around him. Robots are slightly taller than him. Office desks and monitors visible beyond the robot circle.
setting.time_of_day: Midday, harsh overhead fluorescent office lighting

composition.framing: Centered. Subject fills center third of frame. Full body from mid-shin up, clear headspace above. Chrome robots frame the left and right edges, slightly blurred. Human face tack sharp.

lighting.type: Harsh overhead fluorescent office lighting with cold blue-white cast. Chrome robot surfaces reflect fluorescent strips creating hard specular highlights.
lighting.color_grading: Desaturated cool tones, high contrast, slight cyan push on shadows

mood: Bewildered, overwhelmed, frozen in disbelief — the only warm human thing in a cold chrome world
aesthetic_style: 4K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Skin pores visible. Individual facial hairs visible. Looks exactly like a real photograph taken on set.
